config.title: Undo Tree
config.enabledExtensions.description: File extensions to automatically track undo history. Example: `[".txt", ".md", ".js"]`
config.excludePatterns.description: Filename patterns to exclude from tracking. Supports `*` wildcard. Example: `["*.min.*", "CHANGELOG*", ".env*"]`
config.persistenceMode.description: Persistent save mode for undo history. `manual` only saves when you run the command. `auto` saves automatically after history changes.
config.autosaveInterval.description: Interval in seconds for auto-capturing history snapshots (minimum 5). Set to `0` to disable. Default: 30.
config.timeFormat.description: Timestamp display format in the Undo Tree view. Formatting is compatible with [date-fns `format`](https://date-fns.org/v4.1.0/docs/format). `time` uses `HH:mm:ss`, `dateTime` uses `yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss`, and `custom` uses `undotree.timeFormatCustom`.
config.timeFormatCustom.description: Custom timestamp pattern for the Undo Tree view. This setting is used only when `undotree.timeFormat` is set to `custom`. Formatting is compatible with [date-fns `format`](https://date-fns.org/v4.1.0/docs/format). Example: `yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss`.
config.showStorageKind.description: Show storage kind badge (F/D) on each node in the Undo Tree view.
config.nodeSizeMetric.description: Size metric to display as a diff on each node relative to the reference node. `none` hides the metric. `lines` shows line count difference. `bytes` shows byte size difference.
config.nodeSizeMetricBase.description: Reference node for the size diff metric. `current` shows the diff relative to the current node. `initial` shows the diff relative to the initial (root) node — useful when content grows monotonically by appending.
config.compressionThresholdKB.descriptio: Total full-node content size (KB) above which the tree file is gzip-compressed. Set to 0 to always compress.
config.checkpointThresholdKB.description: Total full-node content size (KB) above which full node contents are stored as separate checkpoint files with lazy loading. Should be ≥ compressionThresholdKB.
config.contentCacheMaxKB.description: Maximum in-memory cache size (KB) for lazily-loaded checkpoint content. Oldest entries are evicted (LRU) when the limit is exceeded.
config.hardCompactAfterDays.description: Threshold in days for the `Undo Tree: Hard Compact` command. Nodes older than this value are deleted (except the current node, noted nodes, and their ancestors). Set to `0` to disable.
commands.hardCompact.title: Undo Tree: Hard Compact
